description:
Enriches the CSN Interop Airline service with AI-facing descriptions and vocabulary annotations.

For CSN Interop targets (sap-csn-interop-effective-v1), patch data is plain CSN JSON merged
directly into the matched definition or element object. Use 'doc' for human-readable descriptions
and '@AnnotationName' keys for vocabulary annotations (e.g. @EndUserText.label).
entityType selectors use the fully qualified definitions key (e.g. 'AirlineService.Airline').
See: https://sap.github.io/csn-interop-specification/

data.doc: Represents an airline carrier identified by its IATA airline code. Contains the carrier name and default billing currency.
data.@EndUserText.label: Airline

data.doc: Unique IATA airline code identifying the carrier (e.g. 'LH' for Lufthansa). This is the primary key of the entity.
Full commercial name of the airline as registered with IATA.
Represents an airport identified by its IATA airport code. Contains name, city, and country information.
